name: TodoWrite

todos.description: 待办项目数组的JSON字符串。每个项目有id、status和content。

description_zh: 创建和管理结构化待办事项列表以跟踪进度。每个项目都有唯一ID、状态（pending/in_progress/completed/cancelled）和内容描述。
description_en: Create and manage a structured todo list for tracking progress. Each item has a unique id, status (pending/in_progress/completed/cancelled), and content description.
